Your Own AI Agent —
Running 24/7

Personal AI assistant on Telegram. We handle everything — server, setup, configuration. One payment. Runs forever.

Get Started — $149.99See How It Works

HOW IT WORKS

From payment to live agent in 5 minutes

01

You Pay

$149.99 one-time. Includes 1 year of hosting.

02

We Set Up Everything

We provision your own cloud server, install your AI agent, configure Telegram. Takes ~5 minutes.

03

You Customize

Name your agent, set its personality, teach it about you. It's YOUR assistant.

04

It Runs 24/7

Your agent is always on. Manages tasks, answers questions, sets reminders — even while you sleep.

CAPABILITIES

What Your Agent Can Do

Telegram Integration

Always reachable — message your agent anytime, anywhere

Task & Reminder Management

Never forget anything — your agent keeps track for you

Web Research & Summarization

Get instant insights on any topic without the manual work

Email Drafting & Triage

Your agent helps you stay on top of your inbox

Memory That Persists

Remembers your preferences, context, and conversations

Proactive Check-ins

Heartbeat system — your agent reaches out when needed

Expandable with Skills

Add weather, GitHub, calendar, and more capabilities over time

Runs on YOUR Server

Privacy first — you own the data and the infrastructure

PRICING

One Price, Everything Included

Your own AI assistant, running 24/7 on your own server. No subscriptions, no surprises.

Complete Setup

Your AI Agent

$149.99

One-time payment · Hosting included for 1 year

  • 1 year cloud hosting (DigitalOcean)
  • Full OpenClaw installation
  • Telegram bot setup
  • Agent personality configuration
  • Systemd auto-restart
  • Full server access (SSH)
  • Optional: $49/year renewal after year 1
Get Your AI Agent

Setup takes ~5 minutes. No technical skills needed.

FAQ

Common Questions

It's a personal AI assistant that lives on Telegram. Message it anytime — it can manage tasks, research topics, draft emails, set reminders, and more. It runs on your own cloud server 24/7.

None. We set up everything. You'll receive full access to your server, but you never need to touch it.

One year of cloud hosting on DigitalOcean, full OpenClaw installation, Telegram bot configuration, and your agent ready to use. After year 1, hosting renewal is $49/year.

You choose during setup. Options include Claude Sonnet, GPT-4.1, Gemini Flash, and more. You bring your own OpenRouter API key ($5-10/month typical usage).

Absolutely. You can change its name, personality, capabilities, and add new skills anytime. It's fully yours.

Your agent keeps running. Hosting renewal is $49/year. Or you can migrate to your own server — we'll help.

Yes. Your agent runs on YOUR dedicated server. No shared infrastructure. You have full SSH access.

Stop doing everything yourself.

Your AI agent is one click away.
